# Hiredar: Recruiter-Focused Talent Platform

> Hiredar is an AI-assisted recruiting workspace that ingests resume pools, structures the data, and scores fit so recruiters can deliver trustworthy shortlists faster.

Hiredar communications highlight our recruiter-centric model, credit-based pricing, and commitment to transparent, explainable AI for hiring.

## Essential Content

- [Home](https://hiredar.com/): Overview of our platform and value proposition
- [Features](https://hiredar.com/features/): Full feature set for recruiters, including candidate pools, job postings, and AI-powered matching
- [Pricing](https://hiredar.com/pricing/): Clear, up-to-date subscription tiers and credit packages
- [About](https://hiredar.com/about/): Company background, mission, and leadership
- [Privacy Policy](https://hiredar.com/privacy/): Data usage, retention, and security practices
- [Terms of Service](https://hiredar.com/terms/): Legal terms governing the use of our platform

## OPTIONAL

- [Contact](https://hiredar.com/contact/): Support channels and contact information
